Issues: The core concepts (spacesuit, anti-gravity craft, nebula setting) are highly generic within the sci-fi genre, increasing the risk of being deemed derivative or similar to copyrighted material if marketed too strongly (though this image does not explicitly copy major IP).
While visually stunning, the novelty factor relies heavily on the visual execution rather than a unique concept, making it difficult to trademark or protect against direct imitation.

The intense saturation of the nebula background, while beautiful, could be challenging for print quality color separation or for adapting the image for merchandise that requires a plain, isolated background (e.g., profile pictures).
